headline: Eight ministries push rail-tourism integration to spur service consumption
headline_zh: 八部门联合推动铁路旅游融合促进服务消费
narrative: The day's leading structural story is the inter-ministerial push to boost service consumption through rail-tourism integration, detailed in a directive jointly issued by eight agencies including the Ministry of Commerce and the Ministry of Culture and Tourism. This cross-agency coordination signals heightened policy urgency to stimulate domestic demand as the economy contends with headwinds. Separately, the CSRC's new guidelines on private equity fund regulation underscore the regime's dual focus on growth and risk control.
narrative_zh: 今日主要结构性故事是商务部、文化和旅游部等八部门联合印发促进铁路与旅游融合发展、扩大服务消费的措施。跨部门协调表明在经济面临逆风时刺激内需的政策紧迫性上升。此外，证监会关于私募基金监管的新指南凸显了当局增长与风险并重的双重考量。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4031.513 ▲1.12% · Shenzhen Component 14963.407 ▲0.75% · ChiNext 3830.353 ▲0.50% · USD/CNY 6.7621 ▼0.19% · USD/CNH 6.76 ▼0.04%
